programmes.show_description: OJ is live through the night from the Salford Riviera with Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There and another dial of the Midnight Caller phone.

programmes.show_name: Alternative Sounds of the 90s with Dermot O'Leary
programmes.show_description: In this series, Dermot charts the 60 great alternative albums to hit No 1 in the 90s - in chronological order. We are up to 1998/99 with classics from Blur, Travis and Suede.
Welcome! It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Step Back in Time and Airdrum Anthems. We want to hear about your favourite housemates...
Scott's got your morning sorted... with Roy from Scouting For Girls! Come and play the Birthday Game or take on the Easiest Quiz On The Radio.
Vernon explores the BBC archive in Vernon's Vault and two listeners take on the mid-morning music quiz Ten To The Top. Plus, Holliday Grainger chooses two more Tracks Of My Years.
Jeremy and guests discuss the news headlines and talk to the people making them.
Trevor is bringing you some of the best music from across the decades to get you through the afternoon.
Sara gets you through teatime with plenty of giggles and some fab music. Plus Totally Teavoted, the SARA Awards, Alphabest and Hatched, Matched and Dispatched.
Sara plays the biggest and best tunes to get you up dancing!
Jo brings her Shiny Happy Playlist, 30 minutes of feel-good music from 7-7.30pm to soundtrack listeners' weekday evening.
Sebastien Tellier performs a Sofa Session for Jo, including a performance of 'La Ritournelle' and tracks from his new album 'Kiss The Beast'.

programmes.show_name: The Country Show with Bob Harris
programmes.show_description: Bob and Jackson Dean with an hour of highlights from C2C 2026! Music and chat from Keith Urban, Brooks and Dunn, Alana Springsteen, Tyler Braden, Ashley Cook and more!

programmes.show_name: The Good Groove with DJ Spoony
programmes.show_description: Feel-good dance floor favourites to make you groove, and DJ Spoony hits the decks for The Good Groove mix!
Phil Williams sits in,live through the night from the Salford Riviera with Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There, Midnight Caller and a huge Ravio 2 to end the week.

programmes.show_name: Dance Sounds of the 90s with Vernon Kay
programmes.show_description: Get your horns out and party along to an hour of brass bangers mixed up by Vernon Kay in celebration of Radio 2 Loves Brass. Expect tunes from RuPaul, Rozalla and Wildchild.
Welcome! It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Step Back in Time and Airdrum Anthems. This is your weekend warm up! What are you looking forward to this weekend?
It's a Big Musicals Friday with Tom Allen, Claire Sweeney and Michael Ball in the studio! Plus, Michael's staying on to co-host half an hour of Broadway Bangers!
Actress Holliday Grainger selects her final two Tracks Of My Years of the week and two listeners take on our quiz, Ten To The Top.
Jeremy and guests discuss the news headlines and talk to the people making them.
Trevor is bringing you some of the best music from across the decades to get you through the afternoon.
It's All Request Friday and Sara wants to hear from you on 88291 or sara.cox@bbc.co.uk.
Tonight's gonna be a good night so get into the groove at Michelle's Fabulous Friday party.
Michelle's Mood is... HOME SWEET HOME! Your weekly 30 minutes of non-stop bops right here.
Two hours of the best uplifting disco tunes to dance and sing along to, handpicked by the Disco Queen herself.
